summary: Completed testing of OxxPharma MLM system iteration 2 new features: level-specific dashboards, reports with period filters, and Indicador upgrade flow. Backend APIs all working (100% success rate). Frontend level-specific dashboards working correctly for Admin, Estadual, and Indicador. Minor session persistence issues with Reports page navigation.

integration_issues.issue: Session persistence issues when navigating to Reports page from dashboard - redirects back to landing page

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (100% success rate - 41/41 tests passed)
Admin login and dashboard loads correctly
Estadual login shows state-specific dashboard (SP state, 1 Regional, 1 Cidade, 3 Indicadores)
Indicador login shows upgrade progress (0/20 referrals, R$500 investment needed)
Level-specific dashboard data API endpoints working
Reports API endpoints (sales, commissions, network) with period filters working
Upgrade status API working (shows eligibility, progress, investment requirements)
Upgrade requests API working (admin can view requests)
Referral code display and copy functionality working
User authentication and authorization working correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Reports page navigation session persistence issue - users get redirected to landing page when trying to access Reports from dashboard navigation
